title: Financial Data Analyst
description: About UsWe build practical, high-performance data systems for fast-growing companies. Our team works across the full stack - data engineering, analytics, automation, and AI - to turn messy operational data into insights leaders can rely on. Our team is made up of people who learn fast, build with intention, and work directly on challenges that shape how organizations operate and make decisions.
